title: Just Friends... For Now?
message: The algorithm senses a friendly vibe, but not necessarily a romantic spark at this moment. Your energy alignment suggests you probably get along well in group settings, but there might be a lack of direct, mutual attraction.
advice: Don't force it! Sometimes the best connections start as slow-burning friendships. Focus on getting to know them without any romantic pressure.
zodiacTip: If your signs clash, it just means you have to work a little harder to understand each other's communication styles.

title: Mutual Curiosity
message: There's definitely some mutual curiosity here! You likely catch each other's eye or find yourselves naturally gravitating toward one another in social situations. The potential for a spark is absolutely present.
advice: It's time to be a little bolder. Try striking up a conversation about a shared interest or asking for their opinion on something. A little direct attention will go a long way.
zodiacTip: Your astrological elements suggest you both enjoy playful banter. Lean into lighthearted teasing to test the waters.

title: Serious Chemistry
message: The universe is picking up on some serious chemistry! It is highly likely they have noticed you too. Your combined algorithm suggests a strong magnetic pull and overlapping personality traits that make you highly compatible.
advice: They are probably just waiting for a sign from you! Drop a few obvious hints or simply ask them to hang out one-on-one. The odds are heavily in your favor.
zodiacTip: Your signs align beautifully for romance. Trust your intuition—if you feel a connection, it's real.

title: A Cosmic Crush
message: Wow! The spark here is undeniable. Your deterministic score is incredibly high, suggesting immediate strong attraction and high long-term compatibility. This is the definition of a cosmic crush.
advice: Stop waiting around and make your move! Connections this strong are rare. Be confident and direct about your feelings.
zodiacTip: Your stars are perfectly aligned. This connection has the potential to move quickly and intensely.
